pi_items.source: Decompiled Sygic APK strings (com.sygic.aura.apk) - res/values/strings.xml maps @string/color_scheme to 'Color scheme' and res/xml/settings_view_and_units.xml uses it for the theme preference title.

Decompiled Sygic APK strings (com.sygic.aura.apk) - res/values/arrays.xml uses @string/switch_automatically for the settingsAppThemeTitles array, which translates to 'Switch automatically' in res/values/strings.xml.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the authentic Sygic GPS Navigation application (com.sygic.aura). Analysis of the decompiled APK confirms that the target setting is named 'Color scheme'. However, the claimed target value 'Automatic' is contradicted; the actual string used in the application for this option is 'Switch automatically', which is located under the 'View & Units' settings menu.
